# extras

`extras` provides helper functions for Bayesian analyses.

In particular it provides functions to summarise vectors of MCMC (Monte
Carlo Markov Chain) samples, draw random samples from various
distributions and calculate deviance residuals as well as R translations
of some BUGS (Bayesian Using Gibbs Sampling), JAGS (Just Another Gibbs
Sampler), STAN and TMB (Template Model Builder) functions.

## Demonstration

### Summarise MCMC Samples

The `extras` package provides functions to summarise MCMC samples like
[`svalue()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/svalue.md)
which gives the *surprisal value* (Greenland, 2019)

``` r
library(extras)
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'extras'
#> The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     step

set.seed(1)
x <- rnorm(100)
svalue(rnorm(100))
#> [1] 0.3183615
svalue(rnorm(100, mean = 1))
#> [1] 1.704015
svalue(rnorm(100, mean = 2))
#> [1] 3.850857
svalue(rnorm(100, mean = 3))
#> [1] 5.073249
```

### Distributions

Implemented distributions with functions to draw random samples,
calculate log-likelihoods, and calculate deviance residuals for include:

- Bernoulli
- Binomial
- Beta-binomial
- Gamma
- Gamma-Poisson
- Zero-inflated gamma-Poisson
- Log-Normal
- Negative Binomial
- Normal
- Poisson
- Zero-inflated Poisson
- Skew Normal
- Student’s t

### R translations

The package also provides R translations of `BUGS` (and `JAGS`)
functions such as
[`pow()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pow.md)
and `log<-`.

``` r
pow(10, 2)
#> [1] 100

mu <- NULL
log(mu) <- 1
mu
#> [1] 2.718282
```

### Numericise R Objects

Atomic vectors, matrices, arrays and data.frames of appropriate classes
can be converted to numeric objects suitable for Bayesian analysis using
the
[`numericise()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/numericise.md)
(and
[`numericize()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/numericise.md))
function.

``` r
numericise(
  data.frame(
    logical = c(TRUE, FALSE),
    factor = factor(c("blue", "green")),
    Date = as.Date(c("2000-01-01", "2000-01-02")),
    hms = hms::as_hms(c("00:00:02", "00:01:01"))
  )
)
#>      logical factor  Date hms
#> [1,]       1      1 10957   2
#> [2,]       0      2 10958  61
```

## Installation

## Information

For more information see the [Get
Started](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/chk/articles/chk.html)
vignette.

## Installation

### Release

To install the release version from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=extras).

``` r
install.packages("extras")
```

The website for the release version is at
<https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/>.

### Development

To install the development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/extras)

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("poissonconsulting/extras")
```

or from [r-universe](https://poissonconsulting.r-universe.dev/extras).

``` r
install.packages("extras", repos = c("https://poissonconsulting.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
```

## References

Greenland, S. 2019. Valid P-Values Behave Exactly as They Should: Some
Misleading Criticisms of P-Values and Their Resolution With S-Values.
The American Statistician 73(sup1): 106–114.

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/extras/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/extras/pulls) are
always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the extras project is released with a [Contributor Code
of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## Manipulate Objects

Functions to numericise and fill objects

- [`numericise()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/numericise.md)
  [`numericize()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/numericise.md)
  : Numericise (or Numericize)
- [`fill_na()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/fill_na.md)
  : Fill Missing Values
- [`fill_all()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/fill_all.md)
  : Fill All Values

## Summary Functions

Functions to summarise MCMC vectors as scalars

- [`lower()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/lower.md)
  : Lower Credible Limit
- [`upper()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/upper.md)
  : Upper Credible Limit
- [`zscore()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/zscore.md)
  : Z-Score
- [`pvalue()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pvalue.md)
  : Bayesian P-Value
- [`svalue()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/svalue.md)
  : Surprisal Value
- [`xtr_mean()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/xtr_mean.md)
  : Mean
- [`xtr_median()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/xtr_median.md)
  : Median
- [`xtr_sd()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/xtr_sd.md)
  : Standard Deviation
- [`variance()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/variance.md)
  : Variance
- [`skewness()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/skewness.md)
  : Skewness
- [`kurtosis()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/kurtosis.md)
  : Kurtosis
- [`zeros()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/zeros.md)
  : Zeros
- [`pzeros()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pzeros.md)
  : Proportion of Zeros

## Conversion Functions

Conversion functions

- [`fabs()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/fabs.md)
  : Absolute
- [`exp2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/exp2.md)
  : Exponential Transformation of Base 2
- [`exp10()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/exp10.md)
  : Exponential Transformation of Base 10
- [`ilog()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilog.md)
  : Inverse Log Transformation
- [`ilog2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilog2.md)
  : Inverse Log Base 2 Transformation
- [`ilog10()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilog10.md)
  : Inverse Log Base 10 Transformation
- [`ilogit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilogit.md)
  : Inverse Logistic Transformation
- [`invlogit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/invlogit.md)
  : Inverse Logistic Transformation
- [`inv_odds()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/inv_odds.md)
  : Inverse Odds
- [`` `log2<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log2-set.md)
  : Log Base 2 Transformation
- [`` `log10<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log10-set.md)
  : Log Base 10 Transformation
- [`logit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/logit.md)
  : Logistic Transformation
- [`odds()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/odds.md)
  : Odds
- [`phi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/phi.md)
  : Phi
- [`pow()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pow.md)
  : Power

## Odds Functions

Odds functions

- [`inv_odds()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/inv_odds.md)
  : Inverse Odds
- [`log_odds()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_odds.md)
  : Log Odds
- [`` `log_odds<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_odds-set.md)
  : Inverse Log Odds Transformation
- [`log_odds_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_odds_ratio.md)
  : Log-Odds Ratio
- [`log_odds_ratio2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_odds_ratio2.md)
  : Log Odds Ratio2
- [`odds()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/odds.md)
  : Odds
- [`` `odds<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/odds-set.md)
  : Inverse Odds Transformation
- [`odds_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/odds_ratio.md)
  : Odds Ratio
- [`odds_ratio2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/odds_ratio2.md)
  : Odds Ratio2

## Proportional Functions

Proportional functions

- [`proportional_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/proportional_change.md)
  : Proportional Change
- [`proportional_change2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/proportional_change2.md)
  : Proportional Change2
- [`proportional_difference()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/proportional_difference.md)
  : Proportional Difference
- [`proportional_difference2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/proportional_difference2.md)
  : Proportional Difference2

## Translations

Translations of BUGS/JAGS functions

- [`fabs()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/fabs.md)
  : Absolute
- [`ilog()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilog.md)
  : Inverse Log Transformation
- [`ilogit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ilogit.md)
  : Inverse Logistic Transformation
- [`invlogit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/invlogit.md)
  : Inverse Logistic Transformation
- [`inv_logit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/inv_logit.md)
  : Inverse Logistic Transformation
- [`` `log<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log-set.md)
  : Log Transformation
- [`logit()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/logit.md)
  : Logistic Transformation
- [`` `logit<-`() ``](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/logit-set.md)
  : Logistic Transformation
- [`phi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/phi.md)
  : Phi
- [`pow()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pow.md)
  : Power
- [`step()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/step.md)
  : Step

## Checks and Validation

Functions to check argument values

- [`chk_pars()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_pars.md)
  [`vld_pars()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_pars.md)
  : Check Parameter Names
- [`chk_index()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_index.md)
  [`vld_index()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_index.md)
  : Check Index
- [`chk_indices()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_indices.md)
  [`vld_indices()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/chk_indices.md)
  : Check Indices

## Deviance

Deviances and Deviance Residuals

- [`dev_bern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_bern.md)
  : Bernoulli Deviances
- [`dev_beta_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_beta_binom.md)
  : Beta-Binomial Deviances
- [`dev_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_binom.md)
  : Binomial Deviances
- [`dev_gamma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_gamma.md)
  : Gamma Deviances
- [`dev_gamma_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_gamma_pois.md)
  : Gamma-Poisson Deviances
- [`dev_gamma_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_gamma_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Gamma-Poisson Deviances
- [`dev_lnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_lnorm.md)
  : Log-Normal Deviances
- [`dev_neg_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_neg_binom.md)
  : Negative Binomial Deviances
- [`dev_norm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_norm.md)
  : Normal Deviances
- [`dev_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_pois.md)
  : Poisson Deviances
- [`dev_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Poisson Deviances
- [`dev_skewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_skewnorm.md)
  : Skew Normal Deviances
- [`dev_student()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/dev_student.md)
  : Student's t Deviances

## Residual

Raw and Deviance Residuals

- [`res_bern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_bern.md)
  : Bernoulli Residuals
- [`res_beta_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_beta_binom.md)
  : Beta-Binomial Residuals
- [`res_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_binom.md)
  : Binomial Residuals
- [`res_gamma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_gamma.md)
  : Gamma Residuals
- [`res_gamma_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_gamma_pois.md)
  : Gamma-Poisson Residuals
- [`res_gamma_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_gamma_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Gamma-Poisson Residuals
- [`res_lnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_lnorm.md)
  : Log-Normal Residuals
- [`res_neg_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_neg_binom.md)
  : Negative Binomial Residuals
- [`res_norm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_norm.md)
  : Normal Residuals
- [`res_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_pois.md)
  : Poisson Residuals
- [`res_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Poisson Residuals
- [`res_skewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_skewnorm.md)
  : Skew Normal Residuals
- [`res_student()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/res_student.md)
  : Student's t Residuals

## Log-Likelihood

Log-likelihood functions

- [`log_lik_bern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_bern.md)
  : Bernoulli Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_beta()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_beta.md)
  : Beta Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_beta_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_beta_binom.md)
  : Beta-Binomial Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_binom.md)
  : Binomial Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_gamma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_gamma.md)
  : Gamma Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_gamma_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_gamma_pois.md)
  : Gamma-Poisson Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_gamma_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_gamma_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Gamma-Poisson Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_exp()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_exp.md)
  : Exponential Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_lnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_lnorm.md)
  : Log-Normal Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_neg_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_neg_binom.md)
  : Negative Binomial Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_norm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_norm.md)
  : Normal Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_pois.md)
  : Poisson Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Poisson Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_skewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_skewnorm.md)
  : Skew Normal Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_student()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_student.md)
  : Student's t Log-Likelihood
- [`log_lik_unif()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/log_lik_unif.md)
  : Uniform Log-Likelihood

## Random

Random sample functions

- [`ran_bern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_bern.md)
  : Bernoulli Random Samples
- [`ran_beta_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_beta_binom.md)
  : Beta-Binomial Random Samples
- [`ran_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_binom.md)
  : Binomial Random Samples
- [`ran_gamma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_gamma.md)
  : Gamma Random Samples
- [`ran_gamma_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_gamma_pois.md)
  : Gamma-Poisson Random Samples
- [`ran_gamma_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_gamma_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Gamma-Poisson Random Samples
- [`ran_lnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_lnorm.md)
  : Log-Normal Random Samples
- [`ran_neg_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_neg_binom.md)
  : Negative Binomial Random Samples
- [`ran_norm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_norm.md)
  : Normal Random Samples
- [`ran_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_pois.md)
  : Poisson Random Samples
- [`ran_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_pois_zi.md)
  : Zero-Inflated Poisson Random Samples
- [`ran_skewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_skewnorm.md)
  : Skew Normal Random Samples
- [`ran_student()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/ran_student.md)
  : Student's t Random Samples

## Sensitivity

Sensitivity functions

- [`sens_beta()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_beta.md)
  : Adjust Beta Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_exp()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_exp.md)
  : Adjust Exponential Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_gamma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_gamma.md)
  : Adjust Gamma Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_gamma_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_gamma_pois.md)
  : Adjust Gamma-Poisson Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity
  Analyses
- [`sens_gamma_pois_zi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_gamma_pois_zi.md)
  : Adjust Zero-Inflated Gamma-Poisson Distribution Parameters for
  Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_lnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_lnorm.md)
  : Adjust Log-Normal Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analysis
- [`sens_neg_binom()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_neg_binom.md)
  : Adjust Negative Binomial Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity
  Analyses
- [`sens_norm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_norm.md)
  : Adjust Normal Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_pois()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_pois.md)
  : Adjust Poisson Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_skewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_skewnorm.md)
  : Adjust Skew Normal Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses
- [`sens_student()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sens_student.md)
  : Adjust Student's t Distribution Parameters for Sensitivity Analyses

## Bernoulli

Bernoulli distribution functions

- [`dbern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/bern.md)
  [`pbern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/bern.md)
  [`qbern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/bern.md)
  [`rbern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/bern.md)
  : Bernoulli Distribution

## Skew Normal

Skew Normal distribution functions

- [`dskewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/skewnorm.md)
  [`pskewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/skewnorm.md)
  [`qskewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/skewnorm.md)
  [`rskewnorm()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/skewnorm.md)
  : Skew-Normal Distribution

## Miscellaneous

Miscellaneous functions

- [`par_pattern()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/par_pattern.md)
  : Parameter Pattern

## Generics

Generic Functions

- [`as_list()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/as_list.md)
  : As List

## Deprecated

Deprecated functions

- [`pextreme()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/pextreme.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Extreme Probability
- [`sextreme()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/sextreme.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Extreme Surprisal
- [`as_list_unnamed()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/reference/as_list_unnamed.md)
  : As List

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Beta-binomial Deviance
  Residuals](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/articles/beta-binomial-deviance-residuals.md):
- [Deviance
  Residuals](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/extras/dev/articles/deviance-residuals.md):
